metrics.label: Velocity
metrics.description: Rolling mean of points per sprint across Win + Serve + Data teams, last 2 completed sprints per team.

metrics.label: Operations
metrics.description: Mean Time to Deploy in hours, 4-week rolling average. Source: swain.github.io/deploy-metrics/

metrics.label: Testing
metrics.description: New Bug-typed tasks created per week in Engineering + Data spaces, 4-week rolling average.

metrics.label: Experience
metrics.description: Paused until product team confirms PMF sufficient for measurement.

metrics.label: Security
metrics.description: SensCy IntelliBoard Cyberhealth score. Baseline: 197 on 2026-02-16.
